settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Every order is packed by hand from South Carolina. Processing takes 1-2 business days, and standard shipping is 3-5 business days after that. You'll get a tracking email as soon as it ships.

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes! Free standard shipping on all orders $75 and up. No code needed -- it applies automatically at checkout.

settings.question: Can I change or cancel my order?
settings.answer: We start packing pretty quickly, but if you catch us in time we'll do our best. Email support@coastalpalm.shop as soon as possible and we'll see what we can do.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: 30 days from delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, with tags still attached. Returns are issued as store credit.

settings.question: Can I exchange for a different size?
settings.answer: Absolutely! Email us at support@coastalpalm.shop with your order number and we'll swap it out (subject to availability).

settings.question: What are Final Sale items?
settings.answer: Items marked Final Sale on the product page can't be returned or exchanged. We always mark these clearly before you buy.

settings.question: What is AI Try-On?
settings.answer: It's our virtual fitting room. Upload a photo of yourself and our AI shows you exactly how a piece will look on your body -- before you buy. No more guessing.

settings.question: Is my photo saved?
settings.answer: No. Your photo is processed in real-time and never stored on our servers. We take your privacy seriously -- your image is used only for the try-on and immediately discarded.

settings.question: What kind of photo works best?
settings.answer: A full-body or head-to-knees photo works best. Stand facing the camera, use good lighting, and keep the background simple. Phone photos are perfect.

settings.question: How accurate is it?
settings.answer: It's powered by advanced AI that understands how fabric drapes on different body types. It's not a Photoshop cutout -- it genuinely simulates how the garment fits. Most customers say it's surprisingly close to real life.

settings.question: How do your clothes fit?
settings.answer: Most of our pieces run true to size with a relaxed, beachy fit. If you're between sizes, size down for fitted or stay true for breezier.

settings.question: Do you have plus sizes?
settings.answer: We currently carry XS through 2X in most styles. We're always working to expand our size range -- stay tuned.

settings.question: Where are you based?
settings.answer: South Carolina! Every order is packed with love right here at home.

settings.question: How can I contact you?
settings.answer: Email us anytime at support@coastalpalm.shop -- we get back to you within 24 hours. You can also DM us on Instagram.
